author: Alex S
subject: v2.8.0-beta.1
body: # [2.8.0-beta.1](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.7.4...v2.8.0-beta.1) (2018-05-03) ### Features * **search-client:** Add support for Universal Search Clients ([#2894](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2894)) ([5df3c74](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/5df3c74)), closes [#2905](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2905)
